content:
ed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
    pub permissions: AgentPermission,
    pub last_seen: DateTime<Utc>,
    pub status: AgentStatus,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub description: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub activity_summary: Option<ActivitySummary>,
}
pub enum SessionState {
    Created,
    Active,
    Committing,
    Merging,
    Closed,
    Stale,
    Orphaned,
}
